llm.summary: The task maps directly to docs/product-specs/failure-simulation-and-audit.md. Current implementation resolves bounded endpoint/case delays, applies delay execution in shared endpoint service paths for MCP and REST, maps forced errors into protocol-specific REST and MCP responses, preserves OAuth REST permission checks without double-running delayed endpoint behavior, and includes visible/tested timeout shortcut behavior. Required deterministic checks passed in state/deterministic-checks.json.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Delay behavior works for MCP and REST without corrupting other calls.
Forced REST/MCP errors match configured behavior.
Timeout shortcut is visible and tested without requiring a 30s E2E sleep.
All required commands passed: npm run test:unit, npm run test:e2e -- --grep @failure-delay-error, npm run verify.

summary: The task maps directly to docs/product-specs/failure-simulation-and-audit.md. Current implementation resolves bounded endpoint/case delays, applies delay execution in shared endpoint service paths for MCP and REST, maps forced errors into protocol-specific REST and MCP responses, preserves OAuth REST permission checks without double-running delayed endpoint behavior, and includes visible/tested timeout shortcut behavior. Required deterministic checks passed in state/deterministic-checks.json.
